declined.claim: Perplexity raised $200M in a growth round announced in September 2025.
Perplexity raised $500M in December 2024 at a $9B valuation.
Perplexity was valued at $9B in December 2024.
Perplexity was valued at $3B in June 2024.
Perplexity was valued at $520M in January 2024.
Perplexity has raised approximately $1.22B in total funding as of 2025.
Perplexity Pro subscription is priced at $20/month for power users.
Perplexity now serves more than 100M monthly active users from its search and agent tools.
Google's advertising business generates approximately $260B per year from search.
Google processes approximately 8.5 billion searches per day.
Google has 1.5 billion monthly active users across its search platform.
Anthropic has raised over $1B in funding.
Perplexity's annualized revenue grew 335% year-over-year to $500M by April 2026.
94% of all searches on Google today are 1-5 word queries.
Perplexity Labs claims tasks that previously took days can now be completed in about 10 minutes using its report and dashboard generation tools.

raw_pool.claim: Perplexity's revenue growth rate was 800% year-over-year in 2024.
Management's December 2024 roadmap targets $656M in revenue by end-2026.
At ~$148M in annualized revenue in June 2025, the $20B valuation implies an approximate 120x revenue multiple.
Perplexity serves tens of thousands of enterprise clients.
ChatGPT churn spiked into the 20% range in the summer period referenced.
Perplexity's Computer agent product launched in February 2026 and introduced a usage-based credits pricing model for top-tier subscribers.
